payload.answer: The Brain DB remains the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable projection; Slack is the strict intake agent. Open questions: evaluate Telegram as a potential future integration and identify the cheapest model that still saturates performance. No commitment to Telegram or a specific model yet.

entity_resolution.reason: Open questions indicate uncertain commitments; preserve potential future changes without asserting them as current facts.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth; Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should be a strict memory intake agent; Open questions include whether Telegram should be added later and which model is cheapest while saturating performance.
